title: centaurea cineraria subsp. sirenum
intro: Centaurea cineraria subsp. sirenum, also known as Sicilian silver-gray cineraria, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, offering potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and protecting against oxidative stress. Centaurea cineraria subsp. sirenum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal use, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
